output:
Aggregated execute batches: completed 5/5.
Batch 1: Executed batch 1 task T1. Unified the canonical image edit-mode union to use `upscale`, switched inpainting types to import/re-export `EditMode` from `src/domains/media-lightbox/model/editSettingsTypes.ts`, made `editMode` and `setEditMode` required in `UseInpaintingProps`, removed `fallbackEditMode` ownership from `useInpainting`, and verified the batch with `npx tsc --noEmit`. Checkpointed progress to `.megaplan/plans/refactor-edit-mode-ownership-20260331-1842/execution_batch_1.json`.
Batch 2: Executed batch 2 task T2. Removed the `ImageEditMode` alias, switched the canvas/context and shared image-edit-state builder to the canonical `EditMode | null` type, updated remaining downstream `ImageEditMode` usages, replaced the stroke-overlay inline union with `EditMode`, removed the `MediaDisplayWithCanvas` edit-mode cast, and verified the batch with `rg -n "\bImageEditMode\b" src` returning zero matches plus `npx tsc --noEmit` succeeding. Checkpointed progress to `.megaplan/plans/refactor-edit-mode-ownership-20260331-1842/execution_batch_2.json`.
Batch 3: Executed batch 3 task T3. Removed the `toInpaintingEditMode` bridge from both `useImageEditOrchestrator` and `useInlineEditState`, passed canonical edit-mode values/setters directly into `useInpainting` and `buildImageEditStateValue`, updated the orchestrator to return `persistedEditMode`, and verified the batch with `rg -n "toInpaintingEditMode|as ImageEditState\[|as any" ...` returning zero matches in the touched files plus `npx tsc --noEmit` succeeding. Checkpointed progress to `.megaplan/plans/refactor-edit-mode-ownership-20260331-1842/execution_batch_3.json`.
Batch 4: Executed batch 4 task T4. Added targeted test coverage for `useInpainting`, created a new `useImageEditOrchestrator` edit-mode round-trip test, extended `useInlineEditState` coverage for direct mode pass-through/setter wiring, removed the `magic-edit as any` fixture from `buildImageEditStateValue.test.ts`, and verified the batch with targeted Vitest runs plus `npx tsc --noEmit`. Checkpointed progress to `.megaplan/plans/refactor-edit-mode-ownership-20260331-1842/execution_batch_4.json`.
Batch 5: Executed batch 5 task T5. Final validation passed: `npx tsc --noEmit` succeeded, `npx vitest run src/domains/media-lightbox/` passed with 38 files / 162 tests, `npx vitest run src/tools/edit-images/` passed with 3 files / 13 tests, and all required grep validations returned zero matches. Checkpointed progress to `.megaplan/plans/refactor-edit-mode-ownership-20260331-1842/execution_batch_5.json`.
commands_run: rg -n "fallbackEditMode|setEditMode: \(mode: EditMode \| \(\(prev: EditMode\) => EditMode\)\) => void|editMode\?: EditMode|export type EditMode = 'text' \| 'inpaint' \| 'annotate'|enhance';$" src/domains/media-lightbox/model/editSettingsTypes.ts src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/inpainting/types.ts src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useInpainting.ts

task_updates.executor_notes: Updated the canonical image EditMode union to use `upscale`, removed the local inpainting `EditMode` alias in favor of `../../model/editSettingsTypes`, made `UseInpaintingProps.editMode` and `setEditMode` required, and removed `fallbackEditMode` ownership from `useInpainting` so the hook now uses the required prop and plain setter signature directly. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit`.

Removed the `ImageEditMode` alias from the canvas/context layer, switched `ImageEditCanvasContext`, `ImageEditContext`, and `buildImageEditStateValue` to the canonical `EditMode | null` type, updated remaining `ImageEditMode` imports/usages in `useInlineEditState`, and replaced the stroke overlay inline union/canvas cast with the canonical `EditMode`. Verified with `rg -n "\bImageEditMode\b" src` returning zero matches and `npx tsc --noEmit` passing.

Removed `toInpaintingEditMode` and `InpaintingEditMode` bridge typing from both `useImageEditOrchestrator` and `useInlineEditState`, passed orchestrator/persistence edit-mode values and setters straight through to `useInpainting` and `buildImageEditStateValue`, and updated the orchestrator return path to expose `persistedEditMode` directly. Verified with `rg -n "toInpaintingEditMode|as ImageEditState\[|as any" src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useImageEditOrchestrator.ts src/tools/edit-images/hooks/useInlineEditState.ts` returning zero matches and `npx tsc --noEmit` passing.

Added non-inpainting mode coverage to `useInpainting.test.ts` for `reposition`, `img2img`, and `upscale`; added a new `useImageEditOrchestrator.test.ts` that proves the hook returns and builds with persisted edit modes instead of the inpainting hook's mode; extended `useInlineEditState.test.ts` to verify reposition is passed through to `useInpainting` and `imageEditValue.setEditMode('img2img')` calls persistence directly; and removed the `magic-edit as any` fixture from `buildImageEditStateValue.test.ts`. Verified with targeted Vitest runs (4 files, 23 tests passed) and `npx tsc --noEmit`.

Final validation passed. `npx tsc --noEmit` succeeded, `npx vitest run src/domains/media-lightbox/` passed (38 files, 162 tests), `npx vitest run src/tools/edit-images/` passed (3 files, 13 tests), and all verification greps returned zero matches for `toInpaintingEditMode`, edit-mode casts (`as ImageEditMode`, `as ImageEditState[...]`, `as any`) in touched files, stale `enhance` image-edit references, `type ImageEditMode`, and `fallbackEditMode`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed `UseInpaintingProps.editMode` and `setEditMode` are required, `fallbackEditMode` state/reset logic is fully removed from `useInpainting.ts`, and the setter signature is now plain `(mode: EditMode) => void` without updater overloads.

Confirmed `rg -n "\bImageEditMode\b" src` returns zero matches, `useStrokeOverlayDrawing.ts` now types `editMode` as canonical `EditMode`, and `MediaDisplayWithCanvas.tsx` no longer uses the inline edit-mode cast.

Confirmed `toInpaintingEditMode` no longer exists, `useImageEditOrchestrator` now passes through and returns `persistedEditMode`, and the orchestrator/inline-editor edit-mode casts (`as ImageEditState[...]`, `as any`) are gone.

Confirmed the new `useInpainting` tests cover `reposition`/`img2img`/`upscale` with empty brush strokes and pass-through editMode assertions, the new orchestrator test asserts `editMode === 'reposition'` instead of falling back to `'text'`, and `magic-edit as any` is removed from `buildImageEditStateValue.test.ts`.

Confirmed the type check and both Vitest suite runs completed with zero failures, and all grep validations returned zero matches for bridge helpers, edit-mode casts, stale image-edit `enhance` references, `ImageEditMode` type definitions, and `fallbackEditMode`.
